hero.title:
Avoid GDPR fines
when using AI
hero.subtitle: Up to €20M fines for GDPR violations through AI tools. AnonDoc anonymises documents locally — before they reach ChatGPT, Claude or Copilot.

social_proof.title: Trusted by companies in sensitive industries
social_proof.quote: 'AnonDoc helped us use AI tools in a GDPR-compliant way without endangering our client data.'

why_exists.title: Why AnonDoc exists
why_exists.p1: In March 2023, Samsung engineers lost access to ChatGPT. Sensitive company data and source code had leaked through accidental AI requests.
why_exists.p2: Today companies face a dilemma: AI tools increase productivity by 40–60%, but their use carries GDPR risks worth millions of euros.
why_exists.p3: EU data protection authorities have already issued over €2.5 billion in fines. AI-related violations are the fastest growing category.
why_exists.p4: AnonDoc was built so you can benefit from AI — without the risk of a data protection breach.

how_it_works.title: How AnonDoc works
how_it_works.subtitle: From a document with personal data to a finished report — four steps
how_it_works.step3_desc: ChatGPT, Claude, or any other AI
how_it_works.step4_desc: Upload the AI response — tokens are replaced back with real data automatically

key_doc.title: Document Key — your data protection
key_doc.subtitle: The difference between Free and Pro in one detail
key_doc.no_key_desc: Data is stored only in this browser. Close the tab or clear cache — the key is gone, de-anonymization impossible.
key_doc.with_key_desc: Download the key — a small file with the replacement table. Work with documents for days and weeks. Process up to 50 files in one session — one key for all.
key_doc.shield: Key is stored with you — we can't see it

comparison.title: Compare plans
comparison.subtitle: Choose the right one for your needs

trust.item1_desc: Anonymization works locally — data is not sent to our servers
trust.item2_desc: No internet needed for anonymization. Only for account login.
trust.item4_desc: We physically cannot restore your data without your key
trust.samsung_desc: After a major tech company lost source code through ChatGPT, many enterprises banned AI tools. AnonDoc solves this — without giving up AI.

ai_send.desc: Send anonymised documents to ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Claude, Mistral or any AI — your real data stays protected. Even if the AI leaks data, only tokens can be transmitted, never your actual personal information.

features.title: Why AnonDoc
features.f1_desc: Documents processed in the browser. Not a single byte of content goes to the server.
features.f2_desc: Finds names, phones, tax IDs, passports, addresses and email in milliseconds.
features.f3_desc: Supports TXT, DOCX, XLSX, PDF without additional software.
features.f4_desc: Download an encrypted key to restore the original at any time.
features.f5_desc: Complies with European personal data legislation (GDPR, DSGVO, RGPD).
features.f6_desc: All sessions saved locally. Continue work at any time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What happens if I close the browser without the key?
faq.a1: The replacement table will be lost. De-anonymizing the document without the key is impossible. That's why on Pro we recommend always downloading the document key.
faq.a2: Names, phones, email, tax IDs, company registration numbers, passport data, addresses, organization names, dates of birth, policy numbers and other personal identifiers.
faq.q3: Does it work with any AI?
faq.a3: Yes. The anonymized text can be sent to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other AI.
faq.q4: Can I process multiple documents with one key?
faq.a4: Yes, on the Pro plan. Upload up to 50 files in one session — all tokens go into a single document key.
faq.a5: Maximum security. Documents are processed in your browser and are not transmitted to servers. Even we don't see the contents of your documents.
